h1: LG Soundbar S95TR — 9.1.5ch Home Cinema with Dolby Atmos & DTS:X, Wireless Subwoofer + Rear Speakers

gallery.a: Front view of LG 9.1.5ch Home Cinema Soundbar S95TR system with subwoofer and rear speakers
45-degree side angle of the full S95TR system — soundbar, subwoofer and rear speakers
Front view of the main soundbar
Top view showing up-firing speaker array
Top close-up of soundbar centre channel
Close-up angled view of the soundbar side
Back view of soundbar showing connection ports (HDMI eARC, Optical)
Angled view of wireless rear speakers
Back view of wireless rear speakers

modules.head: The top-tier soundbar worthy of the best-in-class LG OLED
modules.body: Complete the LG TV experience with a flagship soundbar that beautifully complements its design and sonic performance — 9.1.5-channel audio, 810W of total power, Dolby Atmos and DTS:X deliver true cinematic immersion.

imgs.a: LG Soundbar S95TR against black backdrop with up-firing sound waves

modules.head: Rear speakers embrace wireless freedom
modules.body: Install the 2-channel rear speakers with minimal cable clutter — they connect wirelessly to the main soundbar, with only one power cable per speaker. Keep your living room elegant and clean while adding true surround depth.

imgs.a: Wireless rear speakers with virtual sound waves

modules.head: Rich surround sound from wireless rear speakers
modules.body: Fill your space with crystal-clear, multidimensional sound from a 6-channel rear speaker system featuring 2 up-firing channels and Dolby Atmos. Wider transmission range and stable reception unlock a whole new level of immersive audio.

imgs.a: Rear speakers placed behind sofa with up-firing effect

modules.head: Watch your TV with zero mess in sight
modules.body: WOWCAST lets you connect your LG Soundbar to your LG TV wirelessly and unlocks lossless multi-channel audio — no HDMI cable mess, no compromise on quality.
modules.disc: *WOWCAST compatibility depends on LG TV model and year. Software update may be required.

imgs.a: LG Soundbar wirelessly connected to LG TV via WOWCAST

modules.head: Simplicity is right at your fingertips
modules.body: Access WOW Interface through your LG TV for clear and simple soundbar control — change sound modes, profiles, and access handy features using just the LG TV remote.

imgs.a: LG remote controlling soundbar via WOW Interface menu on TV

modules.head: Duets with your LG TV's sound
modules.body: The unique sound, range and tonal qualities of your LG Soundbar and LG TV speakers come together in harmony for an engrossing, impactful sonic experience — both sound sources play in perfect sync.

imgs.a: LG TV + S95TR + subwoofer playing musical performance with synchronised sound waves

modules.head: Feel vast and expressive sonic wonder
modules.body: With 9.1.5 channels driven by 810W of power, the S95TR creates a three-dimensional sound dome that envelops your living room — every frequency, every direction, every detail.

imgs.a: 9.1.5 channel sound dome filling a modern apartment

modules.head: Streams in stunning HD
modules.body: Stream from your favourite platforms without compression through lossless HD support for Spotify Connect, TIDAL Connect, and Google Cast.

imgs.a: TIDAL Connect, Spotify, and Google Cast logos

modules.head: Use the platform of your choice
modules.body: LG Soundbars work with Apple AirPlay, Amazon Alexa, Google Home, and LG ThinQ™ — control the S95TR using whichever voice assistant or smart home platform you prefer.

imgs.a: Apple AirPlay, Amazon Alexa, Google Home compatibility logos

modules.head: Internal parts made with recycled plastic
modules.body: Built with sustainability in mind — internal components use recycled plastic, reducing environmental impact without compromising on acoustic performance.

imgs.a: Soundbar metal frame highlighting recycled plastic components

specs.v: Soundbar + Wireless Subwoofer + 2× Wireless Rear Speakers (6-channel rears)
5 (3 on main bar + 2 on rear speakers)
Dolby Atmos, DTS:X, Dolby Digital, DTS Digital Surround
Yes (wireless lossless multi-channel to LG TVs)
Recycled plastic chassis + recycled-PET polyester jersey grill + recycled pulp packaging
